cleaningFunnel.note: Combined unaltered source data — RAW_DATA (12,880 player-season rows) + RAW_Win_Data (19,320 team-game rows). Every conference, every position, every game.
Restricted both datasets to SEC, ACC, Big Ten, Big 12, and Pac-12 so usage and performance data align on the same team-season universe.
Removed 18 fullback rows from the usage dataset — kept QB, RB, WR, TE as the four analytic positions. Final combined table: 6,265 rows / 81,496 data points.
